rationale: Milestone-2 status is FAILED in STATE.json (failure_reason: wave_fail_recovery_attempt) and Wave T was SKIPPED — zero empirical end-to-end execution evidence. After dedup, three CRITICAL gaps remain on the frontend half of REQ-AUTH-006 / WIRE-AUTH-004 / WIRE-AUTH-005 (no /login page, no packages/api-client, no auth.* i18n namespace) plus a CRITICAL missing E2E round-trip. The HIGH STACK-IMPORT-002 root cause persists (no static @prisma/client import; PrismaService loads via dynamic require). users.service.ts:25 returns 404 instead of 401 on GET /me with a stale JWT. Backend half is otherwise substantively correct (User entity, three /api/auth endpoints, bcrypt rounds=12, JWT 24h, password never serialized, email-existence non-disclosure). Score 525 — well below the 700 FAIL floor. Deduction from comprehensive baseline 640: -75 for additional CRITICAL (Wave T skipped surfaced as CRITICAL by test auditor) and -40 for path-drift HIGHs not in comprehensive view.

ac_results.evidence: schema.prisma:18 + migration present; UserRole hand-rolled (RA-006/TECH-M2-004); empty seed (RA-010); no @prisma/client static import (RA-004/TECH-M2-001/MCP-LIB-001); bcrypt.d.ts shim hides missing @types/bcrypt (TECH-M2-008/MCP-LIB-007/FINDING-007)
auth.controller.ts:33 + auth.service.ts:20 + register.dto.ts:1; bcrypt cost=12 verified (TECH-M2-013); minor TOCTOU pre-check (RA-012); P2002 narrows by string-match not instanceof (TECH-M2-006)
auth.controller.ts:42 + auth.service.ts:52; single 401 with auth.invalid_credentials covers wrong-email and wrong-password symmetrically (TECH-M2-014/IA-M2-015)

auth.controller.ts:51 + jwt.strategy.ts:8 + jwt-auth.guard.ts:26; users.service.ts:25 throws NotFoundException (404) instead of UnauthorizedException (401) for stale JWT user-id (TECH-M2-010/IA-M2-012/FINDING-006)
app.module.ts:28-29 globally wires JwtAuthGuard+RolesGuard; JWT_EXPIRES_IN not pinned (RA-007/IA-M2-010); no auth barrel (RA-008/IA-M2-013); JwtModule omits signOptions.expiresIn (MCP-LIB-009)
no /login route, no LoginForm, no api-client consumption, no auth.* translations (RA-001/TECH-M2-002/IA-M2-003/MCP-LIB-003/TEST-M2-009/FINDING-001)

@ApiOperation/@ApiResponse/@ApiProperty present on auth.controller.ts:30-50 and DTOs; OpenAPI spec not regenerated — contracts/openapi/current.json missing (RA-005/IA-M2-008/MCP-LIB-005); @HttpCode(200) missing on /login (MCP-LIB-011)
app.module.ts:28 producer-side complete; path drifts from contract spec apps/api/src/auth -> apps/api/src/modules/auth/guards (IA-M2-005)
schema.prisma:18 + migration producer-side complete; schema location apps/api/prisma drifts from contract path prisma/schema.prisma (IA-M2-007)
app.module.ts:29 + roles.guard.ts:13 producer-side complete; path drifts (IA-M2-006); no module barrel re-exporting Roles/Public (RA-008)
packages/api-client/ does not exist on disk; apps/web/src/lib/api-client.ts:17 has no Authorization header injection (RA-002/IA-M2-001/IA-M2-004/MCP-LIB-002/FINDING-002)
Wave T skipped per WAVE_FINDINGS.json; no apps/api/test/auth.e2e-spec.ts; integration round-trip register->login->me never executed (TEST-M2-001/TEST-M2-002/RA-009/FINDING-004)

next_actions: Wave A re-run with @prisma/client static import fix (F-005 / TECH-M2-001 / RA-004) — replace dynamic require in prisma.service.ts with `import { PrismaClient, Prisma } from '@prisma/client'` so the AST stack-contract scanner recognises the required import.

Wave B fix loop — close STACK-IMPORT-002, add /login page (F-001) + auth.* i18n namespace in en/ar/id (F-003) + regenerate packages/api-client with Bearer interceptor (F-002), and fix users.service.ts:25 NotFoundException -> UnauthorizedException (F-006).

Re-run Wave T (currently skipped) once Wave B produces buildable output — add apps/api/test/auth.e2e-spec.ts covering register -> login -> me round-trip + duplicate-409 + wrong-password-401 + missing/expired/tampered token cases (F-004).
Regenerate contracts/openapi/current.json via SwaggerModule.createDocument before Wave D rebuilds the api-client (F-009).
Reconcile path-drift in WIRE-AUTH-001/003 (apps/api/src/auth vs apps/api/src/modules/auth) — pick canonical and update REQUIREMENTS.md OR move files (F-007/F-008).

findings.summary: Login page (/login) entirely missing — no /login route under apps/web/src/app/[locale]
packages/api-client/ does not exist + apps/web api-client lacks Bearer interceptor
auth.* translation namespace missing from en/ar/id message bundles
Wave T skipped + no integration register->login->me e2e test exists
No file in apps/api/src statically imports @prisma/client — STACK-IMPORT-002 root cause
users.service.ts:25 returns 404 instead of 401 when JWT user-id is stale
JwtAuthGuard file path drifts from contract — modules/auth/guards vs auth/
Prisma schema lives at apps/api/prisma not contract path prisma/schema.prisma
contracts/openapi/current.json missing — OpenAPI spec not regenerated for milestone-2
auth.service.register narrows P2002 detection by string match instead of instanceof Prisma.PrismaClientKnownRequestError
AuthController has no spec — endpoint wiring untested
JwtStrategy + UsersRepository orphans — no co-located specs
DTO validation tests missing for LoginDto/RegisterDto/AuthResultDto/UserDto
Login email-existence non-disclosure asserted only via exception type, not byte-equal payloads
Hand-rolled UserRole + UserRecord types duplicate Prisma model surface
JWT_EXPIRES_IN default not pinned to 24h in env validation
Custom bcrypt.d.ts shim shadows missing @types/bcrypt
Definition of Done not satisfiable — empty seed.ts
Roles + Public + JwtAuthGuard not re-exported from auth module barrel
JwtModule.registerAsync omits signOptions.expiresIn — relies on per-call cast
RolesGuard registered globally — should be per-route once @Roles() consumers ship
BCRYPT_ROUNDS floor and JWT 24h not asserted as hard contracts
passwordHash leakage check is fragile JSON.stringify substring scan
API DTO casing camelCase contradicts REQ-AUTH-001 snake_case field names
framework_idioms_cache.json BLOCKED for milestone-2::B — Wave B framework claims unverified
JWT_SECRET dev placeholder weak and committed without prod assertion
User.email lacks lowercase normalization
POST /auth/login returns 201 at runtime but @ApiOkResponse promises 200
